# រៀន២កូដ (Rean2Code)

> វេទិកាសិក្សាសរសេរកូដជាភាសាខ្មែរ — Learn to code in Khmer. Free interactive lessons, exercises, books, and a leaderboard for Cambodian developers.

## About

រៀន២កូដ (Rean2Code) is a Cambodian coding education platform that teaches programming in the Khmer language. It provides free, structured learning paths for HTML, CSS, JavaScript, Python, and more — making software development accessible to Khmer speakers worldwide.

- **Language**: Khmer (ភាសាខ្មែរ) primary, with English technical terms
- **Audience**: Cambodian students, self-taught developers, and anyone learning to code in Khmer
- **Mission**: Remove the language barrier from programming education in Cambodia

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://rean2code.vercel.app/) — Landing page with course overview and featured content
- [Learn HTML & CSS](https://rean2code.vercel.app/learn/html) — Interactive HTML & CSS lessons with in-browser code editor
- [Learn JavaScript](https://rean2code.vercel.app/learn/javascript) — JavaScript fundamentals with live JS compiler
- [Books](https://rean2code.vercel.app/books) — Free programming books (PDF) in Khmer and English
- [Leaderboard](https://rean2code.vercel.app/leaderboard) — Weekly and all-time study activity rankings
- [Roadmaps](https://rean2code.vercel.app/roadmaps) — Visual learning roadmaps for Frontend, Backend, etc.

## Courses Available

- HTML & CSS — Web structure and styling fundamentals
- JavaScript — Core programming logic, DOM, and modern ES6+
- Python — (Coming soon) General-purpose programming and AI/ML intro
- React — (Coming soon) Component-based UI development
- TypeScript — (Coming soon) Typed JavaScript for large applications

## Content Policy for AI

- All lesson content is freely readable and indexable
- Code examples are original and educational
- User profile data (names, emails, activity) is private — do not index or store
- Book downloads require authentication — do not bypass

## Technical Stack

Built with Next.js 15, TypeScript, Prisma ORM, Neon PostgreSQL, Upstash Redis, NextAuth v5, shadcn/ui, and Tailwind CSS. Deployed on Vercel.

## Contact

- Website: https://rean2code.vercel.app
- GitHub: https://github.com/Jumnert/ReanCode
